Off Calendar Oct-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Broderick H. Brown, Esq., Law Office, 510-452-6300, moving party

This matter was called twice; attorney called to advice the court that he was coming late, the court vacated its prior ruling.
Copies of the moving papers were provided to the court. No opposition filed and finding good cause for the motion the court rules as follows:
Broderick H. Brown'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF JASMINE VANN is Granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
